stemHtml:
A mountain range runs from North to South, and is located to the west of the destination aerodrome. The wind is 270°/30 kt, the air is unstable and rain is falling on the windward side of the mountains from a cloud with a base at 2000 ft.
At the destination aerodrome, (1) _____ is expected. The cloud base will be (2) _____ and the temperature will be (3) _____ than that at the same level on the windward side.
